emittedEvidence.summary:
Yes — there **was a 2023 Lagavulin Distillers Edition release**, but the official evidence suggests it was presented as part of the continuing **Distillers Edition** line rather than a prominently separate “2023 official launch” page like the Special Releases bottles. The most solid official source I found is Malts/Diageo. ([malts.com](https://www.malts.com/en/products/lagavulin-12-year-old-special-release-2023-lagavulin-distillers-edition-2x70cl?utm_source=openai))

What the sources confirm about the bottle:
- **Bottle/release:** **Lagavulin Distillers Edition**  
- **Distillery:** **Lagavuli
